---
title: "Uči s AI"
toc: false
number-sections: false
lang: hr-HR
comments: false   # bez Hypothesis na dodatku (izvjestaj-estetski M17)
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    body-classes: ai-page
---

```{=html}
<header class="ai-head">
  <span class="ai-kicker">Uči s AI · knjiga kao izvor</span>
  <h1 class="ai-title">Pitaj umjetnu inteligenciju o ovoj knjizi</h1>
  <p class="ai-lede">Cijelu knjigu ili pojedino poglavlje možete dati svom chatbotu
  (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) i postavljati pitanja, tražiti sažetke ili provjeravati
  razumijevanje. Pripremili smo čiste tekstualne verzije knjige koje asistent lako
  čita. Sve radi u vašem asistentu, bez prijave i bez troška.</p>
</header>
```

```{=html}
<section class="ai-ladder" aria-label="Tri načina">
  <div class="ai-ladder-head">
    <span class="ai-ladder-label">Tri načina, od najpouzdanijeg</span>
    <span class="ai-ladder-title">Kako tekst stiže do asistenta</span>
  </div>
  <div class="ai-card-grid">
    <div class="ai-card">
      <span class="ai-num">1</span>
      <span class="ai-card-name">Preuzmi i priloži</span>
      <span class="ai-card-q">Preuzmite <code>.md</code> datoteku poglavlja i priložite je
      u razgovor. Radi u svakom asistentu i ne traži pristup internetu. Najsigurnije.</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ai-card">
      <span class="ai-num">2</span>
      <span class="ai-card-name">Otvori u asistentu</span>
      <span class="ai-card-q">Jedan klik otvara Claude ili ChatGPT s već upisanim pitanjem
      i poveznicom na poglavlje. Asistent treba pristup internetu da dohvati tekst.</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ai-card">
      <span class="ai-num">3</span>
      <span class="ai-card-name">Kopiraj poveznicu</span>
      <span class="ai-card-q">Kopirajte poveznicu na tekst ili gotovu uputu i zalijepite je
      u bilo koji asistent koji koristite, uključujući Gemini.</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

## Pojedino poglavlje

Poglavlje je radni konj. Dovoljno je malo da stane u svaki asistent i daje najtočnije
odgovore jer je tekst usko vezan uz vaše pitanje. Odaberite poglavlje pa preuzmite tekst
ili ga otvorite u asistentu.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
manifest = FileAttachment("data/ai-exports.json").json()
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof pog = Inputs.select(manifest.chapters, {
  label: "Poglavlje",
  format: c => c.title
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const c = pog;
  const tutor = manifest.prompt;
  const q = encodeURIComponent(
    tutor +
    "\n\nTekst poglavlja nalazi se na ovoj poveznici, pročitaj ga i odgovaraj na temelju njega: " +
    c.mdUrl
  );
  const copy = (txt, btn) => {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt);
    const old = btn.textContent;
    btn.textContent = "Kopirano ✓";
    setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = old; }, 1400);
  };
  return htl.html`<div class="ai-actions">
    <a class="ai-btn ai-btn--primary" href="${c.mdUrl}" download>⬇ Preuzmi tekst (.md, ~${Math.round(c.tokensApprox/1000)}k tokena)</a>
    <a class="ai-btn" href="https://claude.ai/new?q=${q}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Otvori u Claudeu</a>
    <a class="ai-btn" href="https://chatgpt.com/?q=${q}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Otvori u ChatGPT-u</a>
    <button class="ai-btn" onclick=${(e) => copy(c.mdUrl, e.currentTarget)}>Kopiraj poveznicu</button>
  </div>`;
}
```

## Cijela knjiga i veći paketi

Za širi pregled poslužite se cijelom knjigom ili paketom jednog dijela. Cijela je knjiga
velik tekst, oko četvrt milijuna tokena, pa najbolje radi s asistentima velikog konteksta
poput Geminija ili Claudea s dugim kontekstom. Pojedini dio knjige stane i u manje asistente.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  return htl.html`<div class="ai-actions">
    <a class="ai-btn ai-btn--primary" href="${manifest.full.mdUrl}" download>⬇ Preuzmi cijelu knjigu (.txt)</a>
    <a class="ai-btn" href="${manifest.full.mapUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Karta knjige (llms.txt)</a>
  </div>
  <div class="ai-dio-list">${
    manifest.dios.map(d => htl.html`<a class="ai-chip" href="${d.mdUrl}" download>${d.label.replace(/:.*/, "")} · paket</a>`)
  }</div>`;
}
```

## Gotova uputa za asistenta

Zalijepite ovu uputu prije nego što priložite tekst da asistent ostane uz knjigu i
odgovara na hrvatskom.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const copy = (txt, btn) => {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt);
    const old = btn.textContent;
    btn.textContent = "Kopirano ✓";
    setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = old; }, 1400);
  };
  return htl.html`<figure class="ai-prompt">
    <blockquote class="ai-prompt-text">${manifest.prompt}</blockquote>
    <button class="ai-btn ai-btn--primary" onclick=${(e) => copy(manifest.prompt, e.currentTarget)}>Kopiraj uputu</button>
  </figure>`;
}
```

```{=html}
<footer class="ai-foot">
  <p>AI ponekad griješi. Provjerite važne tvrdnje u samom tekstu knjige. Otvaranje
  poveznice u asistentu radi samo ako asistent ima pristup internetu, pa je preuzimanje
  datoteke uvijek najsigurnije. Tekst je namijenjen osobnom i obrazovnom učenju uz
  navođenje izvora.</p>
</footer>

<style>
/* sakrij Quartov auto-naslovni blok (koristimo vlastiti hero), kao na ostalim
   hub-stranicama (_atlas.scss, _vodic.scss) */
.ai-page #title-block-header { display: none; }
.ai-page #quarto-document-content { max-width: none; }
/* nadjačaj širinu koju standalone-JS postavi inline (book-include.html) */
.ai-page main.content { max-width: 880px !important; margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important; }
.ai-head { max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto 1.6rem; text-align: center; }
.ai-kicker { font-family: "Public Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: .14em; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 600; color: #4A6B5C; }
.ai-title { font-family: "Newsreader", Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600;
  font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 4vw, 2.7rem); margin: .35rem 0 .55rem; color: #1C1916; }
.ai-lede { font-family: "Newsreader", Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.06rem; line-height: 1.6;
  color: #4A4036; margin: 0; }

.ai-page h2 { font-family: "Newsreader", Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; color: #1C1916;
  margin-top: 2.2rem; }

.ai-ladder { max-width: 980px; margin: 1.8rem auto; }
.ai-ladder-head { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.ai-ladder-label { display: block; font-family: "Public Sans", system-ui, sans-serif;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .12em; font-size: .68rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: #4A6B5C; }
.ai-ladder-title { font-family: "Newsreader", Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.3rem;
  color: #1C1916; }
.ai-card-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem; }
.ai-card { background: #FBF8F1; border: 1px solid #E2DACB; border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.1rem 1.15rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .4rem; }
.ai-num { width: 1.7rem; height: 1.7rem; border-radius: 50%; background: #4A6B5C;
  color: #F2EDE3; font-family: "Public Sans", sans-serif; font-weight: 700;
  display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: .95rem; }
.ai-card-name { font-family: "Public Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.02rem; color: #1C1916; }
.ai-card-q { font-family: "Newsreader", Georgia, serif; font-size: .96rem; line-height: 1.5;
  color: #4A4036; }
.ai-card code { background: #EFE8DA; padding: 0 .25rem; border-radius: 4px; }

.ai-actions { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .6rem; margin: 1rem 0 .4rem; }
.ai-btn { font-family: "Public Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: .92rem;
  font-weight: 600; padding: .55rem .9rem; border-radius: 9px; border: 1px solid #4A6B5C;
  background: #FBF8F1; color: #335043; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
  line-height: 1.2; transition: background .15s, color .15s; }
.ai-btn:hover { background: #EAF0EC; }
.ai-btn--primary { background: #4A6B5C; color: #F2EDE3; border-color: #4A6B5C; }
.ai-btn--primary:hover { background: #3B5749; color: #fff; }

.ai-dio-list { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .5rem; margin-top: .7rem; }
.ai-chip { font-family: "Public Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: .82rem;
  padding: .35rem .7rem; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid #D8CFBE; background: #FBF8F1;
  color: #5A5046; text-decoration: none; }
.ai-chip:hover { border-color: #4A6B5C; color: #335043; }

.ai-prompt { margin: 1rem 0; padding: 0; }
.ai-prompt-text { font-family: "Newsreader", Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.02rem;
  line-height: 1.55; color: #2B2620; background: #FBF8F1; border-left: 3px solid #4A6B5C;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; padding: .9rem 1.1rem; margin: 0 0 .7rem; }

.ai-foot { max-width: 820px; margin: 2.5rem auto 1rem; padding-top: 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #E2DACB; }
.ai-foot p { font-family: "Public Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: .86rem;
  line-height: 1.55; color: #6B6357; }
</style>
```
